title: [MTR4] Los Angeles Metro Rolling Stock
description: This pack adds various rolling stock from the Los Angeles Metro from Los Angeles, CA. Currently, this pack only contains the P3010.
body:
Adds the Kinki Sharyo P3010 from the Los Angeles Metro into Minecraft Transit Railway!

Dependencies:
Minecraft Transit Railway version 4.0.3 or higher
and that's literally it.

NOTE: Each car set should have a "forward" car followed by a "backward" car.
